sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92447" key="r(izwru/xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥιζ-ωρύχος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n92447.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">root-grubbing</tr_>, of grammarians, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.322</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphan.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
